name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Cleveland, OH's Superb Cash Advance at 1351 Euclid Ave Ste 103 offers payday and title loans with fast approval and same-day funding.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance in Cleveland, OH is located at 1351 Euclid Ave, Suite 103, in a standalone storefront on a main commercial corridor in the city. This Cleveland location is open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, offering convenient hours for Clevelanders who need flexible access.

At this Cleveland store, you can apply for payday loans and title loans with quick decisions and fast funding. Call +1 216-284-7124 to speak with a representative about current terms, eligibility requirements, and available loan options tailored to your needs.

When you visit, bring a government-issued photo ID, proof of income or employment, and information about a valid checking account. Superb Cash Advance helps Cleveland residents access the cash they need quickly when unexpected expenses arise.
pros: Same-day or quick approval and funding available for urgent cash needs
Extended business hours (8:30am-8:30pm weekdays) accommodate working schedules
Flexible, customized payment schedules tailored to individual borrower budgets
Accepts all credit types with no credit check required for approval
Minimal documentation requirements streamline the application process
Loan amounts up to $5,000 available for larger emergency needs
Physical storefront location allows in-person consultation and immediate cash access
cons: No APR, fees, or pricing information disclosed on website—standard for payday lenders but critical missing transparency
Unsecured short-term loans in this category typically carry triple-digit APRs and high rollover costs
Limited business hours on weekends (9:30am-6:30pm) despite marketing extended availability
Customer reviews show geo-inconsistencies (Arvada, Colorado mentioned) raising questions about location accuracy
Marketing emphasizes 'no credit check' and minimal questions as features, potentially appealing to financially desperate borrowers
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Individuals without access to traditional bank credit who face immediate bills or expenses
Borrowers seeking in-person lending with minimal documentation requirements
Workers seeking flexible repayment schedules matching irregular income patterns
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best suited for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who lack access to traditional credit and need funds within 24 hours. The critical caveat is that as a payday lender, this product category carries substantially higher costs than alternatives—the absence of disclosed APR/fee information is red flag, and borrowers should compare terms against credit union PALs, employer advances, or credit counseling agencies before committing to short-term high-cost debt.
services: Same-day approval loans with minimal documentation
Second lien title loans (mentioned in reviews)
Quick installment loans with structured payment schedules
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 1351 Euclid Ave Ste 103, Cleveland, OH. Fast payday and title loans with quick approval.
